Nodes.Title: Start
Nodes.Description: Start of the script graph.

Nodes.Title: If Argument Equals
Nodes.Description: Checks the programmable block argument.

Nodes.Title: Run Every Seconds
Nodes.Description: Only continues on the True branch every selected number of seconds.

Nodes.Title: Echo Message
Nodes.Description: Prints a message to the programmable block detail screen.

Nodes.Title: Set Runtime Update
Nodes.Description: Controls how often the programmable block runs itself.

Nodes.Title: Note
Nodes.Description: Adds a comment/note to the graph and generated script.

Nodes.Title: Custom Code
Nodes.Description: Adds raw C# code into the generated script.

Nodes.Title: Set Number Variable
Nodes.Description: Creates or updates a number variable.

Nodes.Title: Add Number Variable
Nodes.Description: Adds a number to an existing number variable.

Nodes.Title: Set Text Variable
Nodes.Description: Creates or updates a text variable.

Nodes.Title: If Number Less Than
Nodes.Description: Checks if a number variable is less than a value.
Nodes.Search: if number less than variable compare

Nodes.Title: If Number Greater Than
Nodes.Description: Checks if a number variable is greater than a value.
Nodes.Search: if number greater than variable compare

Nodes.Title: If Text Equals
Nodes.Description: Checks if a text variable equals a value.

Nodes.Title: Set Any Bool Property
Nodes.Description: Sets any terminal bool property by block name and property ID.
Nodes.Search: generic any block property bool terminal every block

Nodes.Title: Set Any Float Property
Nodes.Description: Sets any terminal float property by block name and property ID.
Nodes.Search: generic any block property float terminal every block slider

Nodes.Title: Set Any Text Property
Nodes.Description: Sets any terminal string property by block name and property ID.
Nodes.Search: generic any block property text string terminal every block

Nodes.Title: Set Any Int Property
Nodes.Description: Sets any terminal integer property by block name and property ID.
Nodes.Search: generic any block property int integer terminal every block

Nodes.Title: Apply Any Terminal Action
Nodes.Description: Runs any terminal action by block name and action ID.
Nodes.Search: generic any block action apply terminal every block

Nodes.Title: Turn On Block
Nodes.Description: Turns on a functional block by exact name.

Nodes.Title: Turn Off Block
Nodes.Description: Turns off a functional block by exact name.

Nodes.Title: Group On
Nodes.Description: Turns on all functional blocks in a named group.

Nodes.Title: Group Off
Nodes.Description: Turns off all functional blocks in a named group.

Nodes.Title: Battery Below %
Nodes.Description: Checks if a battery is below a percentage.

Nodes.Title: Cargo Percent Below
Nodes.Description: Checks if cargo is below a percentage.

Nodes.Title: Door Open
Nodes.Description: Opens one door by block name.

Nodes.Title: Door Close
Nodes.Description: Closes one door by block name.

Nodes.Title: Open Door Group
Nodes.Description: Opens every door in a group.

Nodes.Title: Close Door Group
Nodes.Description: Closes every door in a group.

Nodes.Title: Light On
Nodes.Description: Turns a light block on.

Nodes.Title: Light Off
Nodes.Description: Turns a light block off.

Nodes.Title: Set Light Color
Nodes.Description: Changes the color of a light, spotlight, interior light, or other lighting block.
Nodes.Search: light color colour rgb red green blue lamp spotlight interior

Nodes.Title: Set LCD Text
Nodes.Description: Writes text to an LCD or text panel.

Nodes.Title: Set LCD Group Text
Nodes.Description: Writes text to every LCD/Text Panel in a group.
Nodes.Search: lcd group text panel display write

Nodes.Title: Connector Lock
Nodes.Description: Requests connector lock/connect.

Nodes.Title: Connector Unlock
Nodes.Description: Requests connector unlock/disconnect.

Nodes.Title: Thruster On
Nodes.Description: Turns on a thruster by exact name.

Nodes.Title: Thruster Off
Nodes.Description: Turns off a thruster by exact name.

Nodes.Title: Thruster Override %
Nodes.Description: Sets one thruster override percentage.

Nodes.Title: Gyro Override On
Nodes.Description: Turns gyro override on.

Nodes.Title: Gyro Override Off
Nodes.Description: Turns gyro override off.

Nodes.Title: Gyro Yaw Pitch Roll
Nodes.Description: Sets gyro yaw, pitch, and roll.

Nodes.Title: Piston Extend
Nodes.Description: Sets piston velocity positive.

Nodes.Title: Piston Retract
Nodes.Description: Sets piston velocity negative.

Nodes.Title: Piston Stop
Nodes.Description: Stops piston movement.

Nodes.Title: Rotor Set Velocity
Nodes.Description: Sets rotor or hinge target velocity in RPM.

Nodes.Title: Timer Trigger
Nodes.Description: Triggers a timer block immediately.

Nodes.Title: Timer Start Countdown
Nodes.Description: Starts a timer block countdown.

Nodes.Title: Timer Stop Countdown
Nodes.Description: Stops a timer block countdown.

Nodes.Title: Sound Play
Nodes.Description: Plays a sound block.

Nodes.Title: Sound Stop
Nodes.Description: Stops a sound block.

Nodes.Title: Gas Tank Stockpile On
Nodes.Description: Turns gas tank stockpile on.
Nodes.Search: gas tank hydrogen oxygen stockpile on

Nodes.Title: Gas Tank Stockpile Off
Nodes.Description: Turns gas tank stockpile off.
Nodes.Search: gas tank hydrogen oxygen stockpile off

Nodes.Title: Air Vent Depressurize On
Nodes.Description: Turns depressurize on for an air vent.

Nodes.Title: Air Vent Depressurize Off
Nodes.Description: Turns depressurize off for an air vent.

Nodes.Title: Drill On
Nodes.Description: Turns one drill on.

Nodes.Title: Drill Off
Nodes.Description: Turns one drill off.

Nodes.Title: Welder On
Nodes.Description: Turns a welder on.

Nodes.Title: Welder Off
Nodes.Description: Turns a welder off.

Nodes.Title: Grinder On
Nodes.Description: Turns a grinder on.

Nodes.Title: Grinder Off
Nodes.Description: Turns a grinder off.

Nodes.Title: Assembler On
Nodes.Description: Turns an assembler on.

Nodes.Title: Assembler Off
Nodes.Description: Turns an assembler off.

Nodes.Title: Refinery On
Nodes.Description: Turns a refinery on.

Nodes.Title: Refinery Off
Nodes.Description: Turns a refinery off.

Nodes.Title: Button Command
Nodes.Description: Routes a programmable block argument to a True or False branch.

Nodes.Title: Button Command: startup
Nodes.Description: Use this with a Space Engineers button panel. Set the button to run the programmable block with this argument.
Nodes.Search: button panel command argument press trigger

Nodes.Title: Button Command: dock
Nodes.Description: Use this with a Space Engineers button panel. Set the button to run the programmable block with this argument.
Nodes.Search: button panel command argument press trigger

Nodes.Title: Button Command: mine
Nodes.Description: Use this with a Space Engineers button panel. Set the button to run the programmable block with this argument.
Nodes.Search: button panel command argument press trigger

Nodes.Title: Wait Seconds
Nodes.Description: Waits before continuing to the next connected node. Uses Runtime.UpdateFrequency automatically.

Nodes.Title: Command Router
Nodes.Description: Routes many programmable block arguments from one node.
Nodes.Search: command router argument startup shutdown dock undock mine stop status

Nodes.Title: Start Section
Nodes.Description: Creates a named reusable section. Call it with a Call Section node.

Nodes.Title: Call Section
Nodes.Description: Runs a named section and returns to the next node after the call.

Nodes.Title: Return
Nodes.Description: Returns from the current section.

Nodes.Title: Stop Script
Nodes.Description: Stops the current script and turns off automatic Runtime.UpdateFrequency so the programmable block stops running itself.
Nodes.Search: stop script end branch return finish exit runtime update none
Nodes.Preview: Stop script and turn off runtime updates

Nodes.Title: Repeat Times
Nodes.Description: Repeats the Loop path a set number of times, then continues through Done. Use In for first entry and Repeat for loop-back returns.
Nodes.Search: repeat times loop count for while repeat loop done safe multi tick loopback repeat input
Nodes.Preview: Repeat Loop path {Times} times, then continue through Done

Nodes.Title: Custom Code
Nodes.Description: Advanced users only. Inserts custom C# code into the generated script.

Nodes.Title: Number Greater Router
Nodes.Description: Routes a number variable to different outputs based on how high the number is.
Nodes.Search: number greater router variable count threshold level multiple outputs greater than
